column1: # required_authorizations.tsv  -  the comprehensive per-capability authorization probe set
# (a superset of the coarse core-developer summary table in docs/security.md Sec.1)
# Read by /sap-doctor (references\sap_doctor_authz_probe.ps1) to probe the LOGGED-IN
# user via SUSR_USER_AUTH_FOR_OBJ_GET (RFC-enabled). Also a reference for /sap-evidence-pack.
# Grammar: rows sharing (capability, auth_object) form ONE AUTHORITY-CHECK group -- a
# single authorization instance must satisfy EVERY listed field. A capability with
# multiple auth_objects passes only when ALL its objects pass.
# values: `|`-separated acceptable values for the field (OR); empty = presence-only.
#         `*` in the user grant matches any required value.
# Cell separator is TAB. Lines starting with # and blank lines are skipped.
